needsAttention.title: Start sending real prompts into the game rooms to generate live room traffic and workflow history.
Use game-engineering -> game-qa as the default implementation/review loop.

recommendedFocus: Use game-dev for top-level game asks, routing, and studio decisions.
Use game-design for systems, UX, AI, economy, and player-facing design refinement.
Use game-engineering and game-qa as the build-and-review loop before work is treated as complete.
